title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
